{{Quote|I'm Birhan, and this is my land.|Hefrar Birhan to Etain Tur-Mukan|<ref name="HC" />}}
'''Hefrar Birhan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and [[barq]] [[Farmer/Legends|farmer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], he provided sanctuary to [[Etain Tur-Mukan]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] on the run from the local militia, in his farm. 

==Biography==
{{Quote|Republic my rump. Them's no different to Neimies when it comes to it. We'll still be bottom of the pile whoever runs the show.|Hefrar Birhan to Etain Tur-Mukan|<ref name="HC" />}}
Hefrar Birhan was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Farmer/Legends|farmer]] of [[barq]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. He gave [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] shelter on his farm after the abduction of her [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]], [[Kast Fulier]]. However, he was highly suspicious, anticipating that the Jedi would bring him nothing but trouble, but was persuaded by the [[Gurlanin]] [[Jinart]] not to turn her over to the local militia led by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Ghez Hokan]].<ref name="HC" />

Around one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] later the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] attempted to remove the colonists from Qiilura to keep the Gurlanins on their side. Some colonists refused to leave without a fight, one of which was Birhan who led Etain and several [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] into a mine field.<ref name="HC" />

{{Char-stub}}
